revisions.summary: Draft1 source-comparison notes to carry into draft2 and later human review.

items.note: Title word Paṭiññā can be read as vow/promise; draft uses '서원' as a working rendering and should be confirmed by a human reviewer.
Unapproved doctrinal renderings such as 담마/상가/닙바나 remain working choices; preserve them as provisional until human terminology review.
